title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: libwacom bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for libwacom is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The libwacom packages contain a library that provides access to a tablet model database. The libwacom packages expose the contents of this database to applications, allowing for tablet-specific user interfaces. The libwacom packages allow the GNOME tools to automatically configure screen mappings and calibrations, and provide device-specific configurations.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Wacom Intuos Pro 3rd Gen Button Mapping UI Overlap [rhel-10.1.z] (JIRA:RHEL-122812)
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for ARM 64
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64
Red Hat CodeReady Linux Builder for IBM z Systems
full_text:
An update for libwacom is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The libwacom packages contain a library that provides access to a tablet model database. The libwacom packages expose the contents of this database to applications, allowing for tablet-specific user interfaces. The libwacom packages allow the GNOME tools to automatically configure screen mappings and calibrations, and provide device-specific configurations.Bug Fix(es) and Enhancement(s): Wacom Intuos Pro 3rd Gen Button Mapping UI Overlap [rhel-10.1.z] (JIRA:RHEL-122812)
